title: Comolia nummularioides
taxonomy: Comolia nummularioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This plant is native to South America and is a member of the tribe Merianieae. Comolia nummularioides is closely related to other species in the genus Comolia, which is part of the larger family Melastomataceae. The classification of Comolia nummularioides reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history. As a member of the Melastomataceae family, Comolia nummularioides shares traits with other plants in this group, such as its distinctive flowers and growth habits.
